description_long: This is a modern mattress with a cutaway section revealing its internal structure. The exterior features a quilted, padded white top surface with a subtle circular tufted pattern, providing a plush and inviting appearance. The sides are predominantly black with white vertical stripes and a central oval accent, likely representing a brand or ventilation port. The cutaway exposes multiple internal layers: a top comfort foam layer in green, a blue support foam layer, and a core of individually wrapped metal coils arranged in a grid for support and motion isolation. The base layer is solid and dark, providing foundational stability. The overall design suggests a hybrid mattress combining foam and innerspring technologies for enhanced comfort and support.
description: A hybrid mattress with a quilted white top, black sides with white stripes, and a cutaway showing foam layers and a grid of metal coils inside.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the quilted white top, black sides, and a large cutaway revealing the green foam and blue support layers above a grid of metal coils.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the black side panel with white stripes and oval accent, and a clear view of the internal coil and foam structure through the cutaway.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the mattress's length, with the cutaway section showing the internal layers extending from the back edge.
description_view_3: Right-side view displaying the black side panel with white stripes and oval accent, and the cutaway section extending along the side.
attribute_pattern_design: Circular tufted quilted pattern on the white top surface, evenly distributed.
attribute_edge_piping: White edge piping runs continuously around the top and bottom edges, moderately thick and visually distinct against the black side panels.
